event.name: PSL 2026 Final — Lahore Qalandars vs Karachi Kings

context.pre_match_notes: PSL Final at Karachi — Karachi Kings playing at home ground. Lahore stronger squad, current holders. Evening match at National Stadium — humidity 71%, some dew expected but moderate (not extreme). Karachi crowd advantage at home venue significant. City rivalry element active.

question: Predict match direction when a stronger away team faces home ground final conditions.

verified_outcome.key_variable: home_ground_final + crowd_advantage offsets squad_differential — venue neutralises Lahore edge
